rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.24+commit.e11b9ed9"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"anonymous":false,"inputs":[{"indexed":true,"internalType":"uint256","name":"marketId","type":"uint256"},{"indexed":true,"internalType":"address","name":"redeemer","type":"address"},{"indexed":false,"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"WinningsRedeemed","type":"event"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"marketId","type":"uint256"}],"name":"redeemWinningTokens","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"marketId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"address","name":"user","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"seedBalance","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"payable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"name":"totalCollateral","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"name":"totalWinningSupply","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"name":"winningBalances","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"stateMutability":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"details":"The bug: ETH is sent via call{value:}() BEFORE the user's balance         is zeroed. A malicious contract can re-enter redeemWinningTokens()         in the fallback, draining the contract repeatedly until gas or funds         are exhausted.         Attack flow:           1. Attacker deploys MaliciousRedeemer with a fallback that calls              back into redeemWinningTokens().           2. Attacker calls redeemWinningTokens() with a valid balance.           3. Contract sends ETH at step (B) \u2014 before zeroing balance at (C).           4. Attacker's fallback re-enters: balance is still non-zero \u2192              another ETH send \u2192 re-enters again \u2192 ... until funds drained.         Fix: see ReentrancyFixed.sol (uses Checks-Effects-Interactions).","kind":"dev","methods":{"redeemWinningTokens(uint256)":{"details":"BUG: The ETH transfer at step (B) occurs BEFORE the balance is         cleared at step (C). This violates Checks-Effects-Interactions.         A re-entrant fallback can call this function again with a still-         non-zero balance, repeatedly draining collateral.","params":{"marketId":"Target market"}},"seedBalance(uint256,address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Winning token balance to assign","marketId":"Target market","user":"User to credit"}}},"stateVariables":{"totalCollateral":{"details":"Total ETH collateral backing each market"},"totalWinningSupply":{"details":"Total winning tokens outstanding per market"},"winningBalances":{"details":"Winning token balances for demonstration (marketId \u2192 user \u2192 amount)"}},"title":"ReentrancyVulnerable","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"WinningsRedeemed(uint256,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a winning redemption succeeds"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"redeemWinningTokens(uint256)":{"notice":"VULNERABLE: sends ETH before zeroing balance (reentrancy risk)"},"seedBalance(uint256,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Seeds a user's winning balance (stand-in for actual token minting)"}},"notice":"AUDIT CASE STUDY \u2014 Demonstrates a reentrancy vulnerability in a         simplified redeemWinningTokens function that sends ETH before         updating state. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/vulnerabilities/ReentrancyVulnerable.sol":"ReentrancyVulnerable"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@chainlink/contracts/=lib/chainlink/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/",":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":chainlink/=lib/chainlink/",":ds-test/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/vulnerabilities/ReentrancyVulnerable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9a49acccee106aa9a3088ed76a36dbf27b80d60eb72e6ace980397a4716cdf53","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://ee56de40dd88405c7de954acaa3ea69bd0bdcb7dd510ec6245829ab806851445","dweb:/ipfs/QmbXQcsvv6h3HoJzFWWoRShKorrNtswF54UVirLAkqbShK"]}},"version":1}

redeemWinningTokens(uint256).details: BUG: The ETH transfer at step (B) occurs BEFORE the balance is         cleared at step (C). This violates Checks-Effects-Interactions.         A re-entrant fallback can call this function again with a still-         non-zero balance, repeatedly draining collateral.

redeemWinningTokens(uint256).notice: VULNERABLE: sends ETH before zeroing balance (reentrancy risk)

seedBalance(uint256,address,uint256).notice: Seeds a user's winning balance (stand-in for actual token minting)
